svg.title: Agentic RAG AI Research Assistant — Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the full pipeline from user input through the Streamlit UI, agentic RAG pipeline, hybrid retrieval, tools, LLM, and response output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the user input layer do in the RAG assistant?')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit UI do in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the agentic RAG pipeline work?')
sendPrompt('How does hybrid retrieval work in this RAG assistant?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the agent use?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS vector store work?')
sendPrompt('What does the reranker do in retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How are PDFs loaded and chunked?')
sendPrompt('What LLM is used and how does Ollama work locally?')
sendPrompt('How is the final answer presented to the user?')
